mapper.sql: id, title, addr1, addr2, zipcode, tel, first_image as firstImage, first_image2 as firstImage2, read_count as readCount, sido_code as sidoCode, gugun_code as gugunCode, ST_Y(location) as latitude, ST_X(location) as longitude, mlevel, content_type_id as contentTypeId, overview
status = 'ACTIVE' and deleted_at is null and duplicate_of_attraction_id is null

a.id, a.title, a.addr1, a.addr2, a.zipcode, a.tel, a.firstImage, a.firstImage2, a.readCount, a.sidoCode, a.gugunCode, a.latitude, a.longitude, a.mlevel, a.contentTypeId, a.overview, a.distanceMeters, coalesce(stats.save_count, 0) as saveCount, coalesce(stats.average_rating, 0) as ratingAverage, coalesce(stats.rating_count, 0) as ratingCount, case when s.attraction_id is null then false else true end as saved, my_rating.rating as myRating

left join attraction_popularity_stats stats on stats.attraction_id = a.id left join attraction_saves s on s.attraction_id = a.id and s.member_id = #{viewerMemberId} left join attraction_ratings my_rating on my_rating.attraction_id = a.id and my_rating.member_id = #{viewerMemberId}
mapper.select:
select from ( select ,
ST_Distance( location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography )
null as distanceMeters from attractions
and content_type_id = #{contentTypeId}
and ( title ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(addr1, '') ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(addr2, '') ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(overview, '') ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and location is not null and ST_DWithin( location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography, #{radiusMeters} )
and sido_code = #{sidoCode}
and gugun_code = #{gugunCode}
order by location <-> ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), title asc, id asc
order by read_count desc nulls last, title asc, id asc
limit #{limit} ) a
order by
a.distanceMeters asc, a.title asc, a.id asc a.readCount desc nulls last, a.title asc, a.id asc

select from ( select , ST_Distance( a.location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography ) as distanceMeters from attractions a where a.location is not null and a.status = 'ACTIVE' and a.deleted_at is null and a.duplicate_of_attraction_id is null and ST_DWithin( a.location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography, #{radiusMeters} )
and exists ( select 1 from attraction_saves s where s.attraction_id = a.id and s.member_id = #{viewerMemberId} )
and false
order by distanceMeters asc, a.title asc, a.id asc
limit #{limit}
) a
order by a.distanceMeters asc, a.title asc, a.id asc
select count(*) from attractions where id = #{attractionId}
select count(*) from attractions where id = #{attractionId} and
mapper.sql: id, title, addr1, addr2, first_image as firstImage, first_image2 as firstImage2, sido_code as sidoCode, gugun_code as gugunCode, null as latitude, null as longitude, content_type_id as contentTypeId, overview, status, duplicate_of_attraction_id as duplicateOfAttractionId, duplicate_reason as duplicateReason, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, deleted_at as deletedAt
order by updated_at desc nulls last, created_at desc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into attractions ( id, title, addr1, addr2, first_image, first_image2, sido_code, gugun_code, location, content_type_id, overview, status, created_at ) values ( #{id}, #{title}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{firstImage}, #{firstImage2}, #{sidoCode}, #{gugunCode}, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), #{contentTypeId}, #{overview}, coalesce(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update attractions set title = #{title}, addr1 = #{addr1}, addr2 = #{addr2}, first_image = #{firstImage}, first_image2 = #{firstImage2}, sido_code = #{sidoCode}, gugun_code = #{gugunCode}, location = ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), content_type_id = #{contentTypeId}, overview = #{overview}, status = coalesce(#{status}, status), duplicate_of_attraction_id = #{duplicateOfAttractionId}, duplicate_reason = #{duplicateReason}, updated_at = current_timestamp, deleted_at = case when coalesce(#{status}, status) = 'HIDDEN' then coalesce(deleted_at, current_timestamp) else null end where id = #{id}
update attractions set status = 'HIDDEN', deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{attractionId} and status <> 'HIDDEN'
update attractions set status = 'ACTIVE', deleted_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{attractionId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_saves (attraction_id, member_id) values (#{attractionId}, #{memberId}) on conflict (attraction_id, member_id) do nothing
mapper.delete: delete from attraction_saves where attraction_id = #{attractionId} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_ratings (attraction_id, member_id, rating) values (#{attractionId}, #{memberId}, #{rating}) on conflict (attraction_id, member_id) do update set rating = excluded.rating, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.delete: delete from attraction_ratings where attraction_id = #{attractionId} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_popularity_stats ( attraction_id, rating_count, average_rating, updated_at ) select #{attractionId}, count(*)::integer, coalesce(avg(rating), 0)::numeric(3, 2), current_timestamp from attraction_ratings where attraction_id = #{attractionId} on conflict (attraction_id) do update set rating_count = excluded.rating_count, average_rating = excluded.average_rating, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.sql: a.id as attractionId, coalesce(stats.save_count, 0) as saveCount, coalesce(stats.average_rating, 0) as averageRating, coalesce(stats.rating_count, 0) as ratingCount, case when s.attraction_id is null then false else true end as saved, my_rating.rating as myRating

from attractions a left join attraction_popularity_stats stats on stats.attraction_id = a.id left join attraction_saves s on s.attraction_id = a.id and s.member_id = #{memberId} left join attraction_ratings my_rating on my_rating.attraction_id = a.id and my_rating.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
select
where a.id in #{id} order by a.id asc
select attraction_id as attractionId, save_count as count from attraction_popularity_stats where attraction_id in #{id}
select from attractions where id in #{id}
